painPoints.title: Agent tasks loop endlessly on complex refactors
painPoints.description: Agentic tasks get stuck in recursive loops on multi-file refactors, consuming tokens without making progress. Requires force-quitting the agent.

painPoints.title: Spec files go stale silently
painPoints.description: Specs generated for a feature become outdated as code evolves, but Kiro offers no diff or staleness signal. Teams discover drift only after agent produces wrong output.

painPoints.title: Autopilot makes unexpected file deletions
painPoints.description: Autopilot mode has deleted non-empty files it deemed 'redundant' during cleanup tasks. No dry-run or preview mode available before destructive changes.

painPoints.title: Poor Python / non-Node ecosystem support
painPoints.description: Hooks, auto-imports, and agent context work well for JS/TS but break down for Python, Go, and Rust projects. Many ecosystem-specific tools are not wired.

painPoints.title: No pause / resume for long agent runs
painPoints.description: Once an agent task is kicked off, there is no way to pause it partway and resume later. Cancel is the only option, discarding all progress.

painPoints.title: Context window overflows on large monorepos
painPoints.description: Agent loses earlier file context in repos >200k LOC, producing inconsistent code that contradicts previously established patterns.

featureRequests.title: Undo / rollback for agent changes
featureRequests.description: One-click rollback of all files modified during an agent session, with a git-style diff preview before committing.

featureRequests.title: Spec staleness detection
featureRequests.description: Automatically flag specs that are out of sync with the current codebase and suggest a refresh.

featureRequests.title: Multi-repo / monorepo context
featureRequests.description: Allow agent tasks to span across multiple packages in a monorepo with shared context and dependency awareness.

featureRequests.title: Dry-run mode for autopilot
featureRequests.description: Preview all file changes autopilot intends to make before executing, with approve/reject per file.

featureRequests.title: CI/CD spec integration
featureRequests.description: Auto-generate GitHub Actions workflows from spec files, keeping pipeline and spec in sync.

featureRequests.title: Custom agent personas / prompts
featureRequests.description: Allow teams to define a shared agent persona (tone, conventions, test style) stored in .kiro/persona.md.

featureRequests.title: Pair mode (human + agent simultaneously)
featureRequests.description: Allow the developer to type alongside the agent in real time rather than waiting for the agent to finish.

featureRequests.title: Built-in test generation from specs
featureRequests.description: Auto-generate unit and integration test scaffolding directly from the spec acceptance criteria.

sentiment.summary: Early adopters are genuinely excited by Kiro's spec-driven workflow and agent depth, but trust is fragile — a single destructive autopilot incident turns enthusiasts into skeptics. Safety and transparency features are the most-requested theme by a wide margin.

competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.comparison: The default 'AI IDE' comparison. Cursor's established tab-complete and Composer mode feel more predictable. Kiro must differentiate on specs and deeper autonomy, not just inline completions.

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot (agent mode)
competitors.comparison: Deep VS Code integration and brand recognition give Copilot a distribution moat. GitHub's new agent mode directly competes with Kiro's autopilot at a lower context-switch cost for existing users.

competitors.name: Windsurf
competitors.comparison: Windsurf's Cascade agent is seen as more stable for multi-file tasks. Its 'flows' concept resonates with users who find Kiro specs too heavyweight for small tasks.

competitors.name: Devin
competitors.comparison: Devin targets fully autonomous end-to-end tasks — a different market segment. Seen as complementary by most teams, though its PR review features overlap with Kiro autopilot.

roadmap.title: Undo / rollback for agent sessions
roadmap.reason: Mentioned in 47% of negative discussions and #1 feature request

roadmap.title: Dry-run preview before autopilot executes
roadmap.reason: Directly addresses file-deletion incidents in 34% of trust complaints

roadmap.title: Pause / resume for running agent tasks
roadmap.reason: Appears in 28% of UX feature requests

roadmap.title: Python / Go ecosystem parity
roadmap.reason: Cited as primary reason for not switching from Cursor in 26% of Reddit threads

roadmap.title: Built-in test generation from specs
roadmap.reason: Appears in 19% of spec-related feature discussions

roadmap.title: Custom agent persona config (.kiro/persona.md)
roadmap.reason: Top request from team leads adopting shared coding standards
